case_title: OPORTUN INC. VS. IRMA MALDONADO SAAVEDRA

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY JHONATTAN HERRADA. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN INC. AS TO DEFENDANT SAAVEDRA, IRMA MALDONADO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-28-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2018 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAAVEDRA, IRMA MALDONADO $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,605.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 110.00 - SERVED AUG-14-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAAVEDRA, IRMA MALDONADO
